subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Hawdaj (=Lawh-i-Samsun)
subcodes.first_line: These verses were revealed behind the Veil of Immortality, in the Howdah of Holiness, when the Most Great Name arrived
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات ظهرت فی خدر البقا و هودج القدس حین ورود اسم الاعظم عن شطر السبحان
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @banishment to; life in Constantinople
